summary: Evidence packet for the runx sbom-maker skill (umbtest03/sbom-maker@1.2.0). A real post-publish dogfood run of the published package produced a sealed runx.receipt.v1 that passes runx verify with a production signature. The SBOM extracted 2 components (express 4.18.2 GPL-3.0, lodash 4.17.21 MIT), each grounded at its real lockfile location (packages["node_modules/<name>"] for the npm v2 packages-map format), and flagged the GPL-3.0 dependency as a high license risk. This PR is additive only: it adds skills/sbom-maker/** on top of the current runxhq/runx main and deletes no other skill. source_url, X.yaml, SKILL.md and verification.json all resolve at a single source revision (commit 8706672524005ceffb7ed60152de74e3ee108ca7); this evidence packet and the report are its direct child.

license_risks.reason: GPL-3.0 may trigger viral licensing requirements

observations.value: runx login --provider github --for publish, then runx registry publish ./skills/sbom-maker/SKILL.md --registry https://api.runx.ai --version 1.2.0 --profile ./skills/sbom-maker/X.yaml
observations.detail: Authenticate and publish commands (owner resolved from the login identity = umbtest03).
Clean install command (verified: source=remote, status=installed, digest matches published).
Harness case names with sealed/refused status.

observations.value: Published package installs cleanly from the remote registry (runx add: source=remote, status=installed, digest=sha256:f2c60e7aa4cc952e3fd3ed85b2fa951e1c94838c5b0dcef2b026597834a7843e). Harness cases validate against BOTH the local source dir and the registry-downloaded package copy: `runx harness ./skills/sbom-maker` and `runx harness ./skills/umbtest03/sbom-maker/1.2.0` each passed 3/3 with 0 assertion errors (supported-lockfile sealed, supported-lockfile-classic sealed, unsupported-lockfile refused). Environment: WSL Linux local runtime + remote registry install. No separate hosted harness eval endpoint is claimed.

observations.detail: License risk flagged by the skill.
Each component's evidence_location resolves to its real key in the supplied lockfile (packages-map format). The classic dependencies-map format resolves to dependencies["<name>"].
Refusal message emitted for the unsupported-lockfile case (emits no SBOM).

observations.value: Install: runx add umbtest03/sbom-maker@1.2.0 --registry https://api.runx.ai. Run: runx skill umbtest03/sbom-maker@1.2.0 --registry https://api.runx.ai --json -i lockfile_type=npm-shrinkwrap --input-json lockfile='<lockfile-json>' -R ./receipts. Verify: runx verify --receipt <receipt.json> --json (expects valid=true, signature_mode=production).
observations.detail: End-to-end install/run/verify for a new user without private context.
